timeseries.frame_cadence_rule: subsample the ROI-transit window (positions with any >=17.5 m/s wind in the ROI) at stride N = max(1, ceil(window_len / 80)), capping the frame count at 80; the final frame is forced to the running max over ALL resampled positions so it equals the full max-swath exactly

disclaimer: Research/preparedness demonstration only; counterfactuals are hypothetical.
provenance: impact values copied verbatim from scenario cache 8cd07b9c68a0642f; wind grid recomputed deterministically from cached track via wind_field(); boundaries GADM v4.1 GID_2 (PSGC crosswalk: roadmap)
